subject: LU-18141 obdclass: don't check for NULL before free'ing [2]

values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

parents.subject: LU-9633 ptlrpc: Add kernel doc style for ptlrpc (16)

commit.subject: LU-18141 obdclass: don't check for NULL before free'ing [2]
commit.message:
LU-18141 obdclass: don't check for NULL before free'ing [2]

The common free'ing macros already check for NULL,
so we don't need to explicitly check this beforehand.

The patch has been generated with the coccinelle script below.

@@
expression E;
@@
- if (E != NULL)
(
  OBD_FREE_PTR(E);
|
  OBD_FREE(E, ...);
|
  LIBCFS_FREE(E, ...);
|
  CFS_FREE_PTR(E);
|
  CFS_FREE_PTR_ARRAY(E, ...);
)

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I6042a87adfce953e46130fd11e70bb107db0fff5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60001
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
